commands.name: setup
commands.description: Sets up the bot in the server.

commands.name: addbotchannel
commands.description: Add a bot command channel.

commands.name: removebotchannel
commands.description: Remove a bot command channel.

commands.name: addadminrole
commands.description: Add an admin role for bot permissions.

commands.name: removeadminrole
commands.description: Remove an admin role for bot permissions.

commands.name: listbotchannels
commands.description: List configured bot channels.

commands.name: listadminroles
commands.description: List configured admin roles.

commands.name: setbotlogchannel
commands.description: Set or change the bot logging channel.

commands.name: help
commands.description: Prompts this message!

commands.name: quickstart
commands.description: Show a quick getting-started guide for admins, captains, and users.

commands.name: info
commands.description: Shows information about the bot!

commands.name: invite
commands.description: Get the bot's invite link!

commands.name: version
commands.description: Shows the current version of the bot!

commands.name: ping
commands.description: Check the bot's latency!

commands.name: create_team
commands.description: Create a new team in this server.
commands.usage: /create_team team_name:<name> game:<game> team_captain:<member> team_role:<role> team_schedule_channel:<channel> team_request_channel:<channel> timezone:<timezone>

commands.name: list_teams
commands.description: List all teams in this server.

commands.name: delete_team
commands.description: Delete a team from this server.

commands.name: modify_team
commands.description: Modify an existing team's details.

commands.name: request_match
commands.description: Request a match from another team with selected time and timezone.

commands.name: my_teams
commands.description: Show teams you are part of or captain of.

commands.name: send_schedule
commands.description: Send a scheduling message for a team (admin or team captain only).

commands.name: event
commands.description: Create a team event with RSVP buttons.
